Specialties
Award Winning Fried Chicken & French Toast
A "Springer Mountain Farms" fried chicken breast served with Granny Smith cinnamon apples and
certified organic, warm Vermont maple syrup.
Featured
32 reviews

32 reviews
Famous Fried Chicken Platter
Two "Springer Mountain Farms" skinless, boneless, buttermilk brined chicken breasts, hand breaded and fried to perfection (Jim's Maw-Maw's recipe). Served with your choice of two, made from scratch sides.
Featured
9 reviews
14
1
1
16 pops
9 reviews
North Georgia Apple Salad
North Georgia Apples are the star of this dish! We serve them on top of mixed greens with roasted butternut squash, goat cheese, spiced pecans (from our friends at Durden Pecan Co. in Metter, GA) and salted caramel vinaigrette. Served with your choice of fried or grilled chicken.
2 reviews
Nashville Hot Chicken Breakfast
(Available daily until biscuits are gone.)
"A Game Changer!" Open faced, made from scratch buttermilk biscuit, covered with white pepper gravy and topped with two scrambled eggs, a fried chicken breast, and Nashville Hot Oil. BAMM!! Served with your choice of one made from scratch side.
1 review
2
3
5 pops
1 review
Nashville Hot Chicken
Two fried chicken breasts served over Texas Toast, with housemade bread-n-butter pickles and ranch dressing. Comes with one side. Our Nashville Hot Oil is made from scratch, has a little "giddy-up", but won't hurt you! A recipe better than any in The Music City.
8 reviews
9
9 pops
8 reviews
Mom's Meatloaf Platter
It's a family recipe! Certified angus beef and ground pork meatloaf topped with a tangy tomato sauce. Served with your choice of two sides. Thanks Mom! (GF)
2 reviews
1
1 pop
2 reviews
The Local Benedict (Available Weekends Only)
A made from scratch buttermilk biscuit served open faced and topped with a fried chicken breast, two eggs over medium, and our housemade hollandaise sauce. Served with your choice of one side.
2
2 pops
4 reviews
Grilled Chicken Platter
Two skinless, boneless, buttermilk brined chicken breasts. Served with your choice of two, made from scratch sides.
3
3 pops
Blue Devil Salad
Named for our hometown team and a house favorite, gluten free option! We top mixed greens with grilled chicken, tomato, cucumber, blue cheese, bacon, hard boiled egg, and sweet ginger hot sauce. Not gluten free? We dare you to substitute for fried chicken!
1 review
5
5 pops
1 review
Local Breakfast Skillet
Skillet full of breakfast potatoes topped with peppers & onions, housemade white gravy, cheese, and a scrambled egg. Served with your choice of bacon, sausage, or chicken sausage. Substitute fried chicken for $4. Served with one side.

meta.meta_description: The Marietta Local in Marietta, GA. Call us at (770) 766-8403. Check out our location and hours, and latest menu with photos and reviews.
